jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.description: Are you a talented Senior AI Engineer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.
match_reasons: Strong overlap with tech stack: Java, JavaScript, Node.js, Python are all key skills.
No location restrictions, allowing work from Nigeria.
Senior engineer level matches candidate's 7+ years of experience.

jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer - Full Remote or Hybrid (m/f/d)
jobs.description: Born in France in 2006, Voyage Privé has grown from an ambitious startup into becoming Europe’s leading travel tech platform.
match_reasons: Full remote work option available, suitable for working from Nigeria.
Role focuses on software engineering matching backend and leadership skills.
The candidate's experience with AWS and scalable systems fits travel tech's needs.

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Infisical is looking to hire exceptional talent to join our teams in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.
match_reasons: Strong overlap with tech stack including JavaScript and Python.
Senior level role aligns with experience.
Security infrastructure domain relevant to backend expertise.

jobs.title: Senior Video Chat Platform Engineer
jobs.location: Flexible / Remote, Los Angeles, CA, Oakland, CA
jobs.description: Join the Pilotly team, the first market research platform built for creative content. By allowing viewers to give feedback in real-time on unreleased content, we help the largest content creators around the world make better decisions.
match_reasons: Remote work flexibility possibly includes work from Nigeria.
Senior level role aligns with candidate's experience.
Role in platform engineering likely involves relevant backend skills.

jobs.title: Enterprise Core Sales Engineer
jobs.description: Samsara is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights.
match_reasons: Position is based in USA, restricting work from Nigeria.
Enterprise core sales engineering may not directly match backend focus.
No clear overlap with preferred tech stacks.
